name: Fantasma x 360° Vision International Camp
location: Veterans Field, 4170 Sardis Rd, Murrysville, PA 15668
description: A 3-day training camp hosted by Fantasma Football in partnership with 360° Vision Academy from Germany. One of their coaches will be flying in to lead sessions alongside the Fantasma staff. Players will be grouped by age across all three days, with high-intensity technical sessions, tactical development, and competitive play. A small number of top-performing 2011 and 2012 players from the camp will also be invited to compete in a tournament in Spain next Easter, alongside players selected from other 360° Vision camps around the world.
